# Security Report

Do not file exploitable security issues publicly.

Use the private process in [`SECURITY.md`](../../SECURITY.md). Include only
redacted reproduction details and never include:

- secrets or credentials
- tokens, cookies, private keys, or raw credential references
- real hostnames or IP addresses
- screenshots or screen recordings
- audit databases or audit exports
- approval queue files
- generated manifests or artifacts

For non-sensitive hardening suggestions, use the feature request template and
describe the safety impact without exposing operational details.
